title: The Human Condition II: Road to Eternity
original_title: 人間の條件　第３部望郷篇／第４部戦雲篇
overview: Kaji, sent to the Japanese army labeled Red, witnesses cruelties in the army and revolts against the abusive treatment against a fellow recruit. He also sees his friend Shinjô defecting to the Russian border, and he ends in the front to fight a lost battle against the Russian tanks division.
